title: AXChipsSizeType
description: Defines the size options available for chips components. This type is a subset of AXStyleSizeType, specifically excluding 'ax-xs' and 'ax-xl' sizes that are not applicable to chips.

sections.title: Type Definition
sections.description: Union type of supported size values for chips.

props.name: AXChipsSizeType
props.description: Size values supported by chips (subset of AXStyleSizeType).
